userStories.title: Add parallel-batch.ts and rename rectify file
userStories.description: Extract batch orchestration logic from parallel-executor.ts and parallel-executor-rectification-pass.ts into a new focused file src/execution/parallel-batch.ts. This file exports runParallelBatch() which creates worktrees, runs executeParallelBatch (from parallel-worker.ts), merges results via MergeEngine, runs a rectification pass for conflicts, and returns ParallelBatchResult with per-story costs from the storyCosts Map (not even-split). Simultaneously rename src/execution/parallel-executor-rectify.ts to src/execution/merge-conflict-rectify.ts with identical exports, and update all import sites. Delete parallel-executor-rectification-pass.ts after absorbing its logic.
acceptanceCriteria: runParallelBatch({ stories, ctx, prd }) returns ParallelBatchResult where completed contains stories whose pipeline passed and were merged to base branch
runParallelBatch returns ParallelBatchResult where failed contains { story, pipelineResult: PipelineRunResult } for each story whose pipeline did not pass
runParallelBatch returns ParallelBatchResult where mergeConflicts contains { story, rectified: boolean, cost: number } for each story that had a merge conflict
runParallelBatch returns storyCosts Map where storyCosts.get(story.id) equals the per-story cost from executeParallelBatch's storyCosts, not an even-split formula
runParallelBatch returns totalCost equal to the sum of all per-story costs in the batch
When executeParallelBatch returns a merge conflict for a story, runParallelBatch calls rectifyConflictedStory and sets rectified: true in mergeConflicts when rectification succeeds
When rectifyConflictedStory fails, runParallelBatch sets rectified: false in mergeConflicts for that story

src/execution/merge-conflict-rectify.ts exports ConflictedStoryInfo, RectificationResult, RectifyConflictedStoryOptions, and rectifyConflictedStory with identical signatures to the original parallel-executor-rectify.ts
All import sites of parallel-executor-rectify are updated to import from merge-conflict-rectify
parallel-executor-rectification-pass.ts is deleted and no file in src/ imports from it
priorErrors: Attempt 1 failed with model tier: balanced: Autofix exhausted: review still failing after fix attempts

priorFailures.summary: Failed with tier balanced, escalating to next tier

reviewFindings.message: The diff is truncated to only show the acceptance test file. The story requires creating src/execution/parallel-batch.ts, renaming parallel-executor-rectify.ts to merge-conflict-rectify.ts, deleting parallel-executor-rectification-pass.ts, and updating all import sites. None of these implementation changes are visible in the diff. ACs 4, 8, 9, and 10 cannot be verified.
Uses Bun.spawnSync(["rm", "-rf", tmpDir]) for test cleanup. Rule 04-forbidden-patterns.md explicitly bans rm -rf in test cleanup due to accidental deletion risk.

tmpDir is created with Bun.spawnSync(["mkdir", "-p", tmpDir]) rather than mkdtempSync. mkdtempSync atomically creates a unique temp directory and returns its path, avoiding a TOCTOU race between path generation and directory creation.

The BatchOverrides.failed type is { story: UserStory; error: string }[] but AC-2 asserts result.failed[0].pipelineResult is defined with success: false. This means runParallelBatch must synthesize a PipelineRunResult from the raw error string. This mapping logic is reasonable but must be present in the (invisible) parallel-batch.ts implementation.

userStories.title: Add selectIndependentBatch() to story-selector and parallelCount to ExecutionContext
userStories.description: Add selectIndependentBatch(stories, maxCount) to src/execution/story-selector.ts that returns the first dependency-free batch of stories capped at maxCount. Move groupStoriesByDependencies from parallel-coordinator.ts to story-selector.ts (or re-export from there) so the function is not duplicated. Add parallelCount?: number to SequentialExecutionContext in src/execution/executor-types.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: selectIndependentBatch(stories, maxCount) returns an empty array when stories is empty
selectIndependentBatch(stories, maxCount) returns a single-element array when exactly one story has no unmet dependencies
selectIndependentBatch(stories, maxCount) returns at most maxCount stories even when more dependency-free stories are available
selectIndependentBatch(stories, maxCount) returns only stories whose dependencies are all in status 'completed' (no unmet deps)
selectIndependentBatch is exported from src/execution/story-selector.ts
SequentialExecutionContext in src/execution/executor-types.ts has a parallelCount?: number field
groupStoriesByDependencies is accessible from src/execution/story-selector.ts (exported or re-exported) and parallel-coordinator.ts imports it from story-selector.ts rather than defining its own copy

priorFailures.summary: Failed with tier fast, escalating to next tier

reviewFindings.message: Implementation file src/execution/story-selector.ts is not present in the diff. The test file imports selectIndependentBatch and groupStoriesByDependencies from this module, but no creation or modification of this source file is visible. ACs 1-5 and 7 cannot be verified.
AC 6 requires adding parallelCount?: number to SequentialExecutionContext in src/execution/executor-types.ts, but no changes to this file are present in the diff.

AC 7 requires parallel-coordinator.ts to import groupStoriesByDependencies from story-selector.ts rather than defining its own copy, but no changes to this file are visible in the diff. Cannot verify the deduplication/re-export requirement.

AC 4 specifies dependencies must be in status 'completed', but the test uses status 'passed' (via createCompletedStory which sets status: "passed"). If the canonical terminal status in the UserStory type is 'passed', the AC wording and test description on line 95 disagree with each other — one of them is incorrect.

userStories.title: Unify executors — integrate parallel dispatch into sequential loop
userStories.description: Rename src/execution/sequential-executor.ts to src/execution/unified-executor.ts and rename the exported function from executeSequential to executeUnified. Extend the executor loop to dispatch to runParallelBatch when ctx.parallelCount > 0 and selectIndependentBatch returns more than 1 story; fall back to runIteration for single-story or non-parallel runs. Route parallel failures through handlePipelineFailure (same escalation path as sequential). Emit story:started events for each story before the batch. Simplify runner-execution.ts to always call executeUnified (remove separate parallel dispatch branch). Delete parallel-executor.ts and lifecycle/parallel-lifecycle.ts. Update runner.ts to remove reference to _runnerDeps.runParallelExecution.
acceptanceCriteria: src/execution/unified-executor.ts exports executeUnified() with the same return type as the former executeSequential()
When ctx.parallelCount > 0 and selectIndependentBatch returns more than 1 story, executeUnified calls runParallelBatch instead of runIteration
When ctx.parallelCount > 0 but selectIndependentBatch returns exactly 1 story, executeUnified calls runIteration for that story
When ctx.parallelCount is undefined or 0, executeUnified always calls runIteration and never calls runParallelBatch
For each story in a parallel batch, pipelineEventBus.emit({ type: 'story:started', storyId: story.id }) fires before runParallelBatch is called
When a parallel story's pipelineResult indicates failure, executeUnified passes it to handlePipelineFailure and handleTierEscalation is reached when finalAction === 'escalate'
After a parallel batch, the existing cost-limit check in the loop runs and exits with reason 'cost-limit' when totalCost exceeds the configured limit
runner-execution.ts no longer contains a conditional parallel dispatch branch; it always calls executeUnified passing parallelCount from its options
src/execution/parallel-executor.ts is deleted and no file in src/ imports from it
src/execution/lifecycle/parallel-lifecycle.ts is deleted and no file in src/ imports from it
runner.ts no longer references _runnerDeps.runParallelExecution
priorErrors: Attempt 1 failed with model tier: balanced: Autofix exhausted: review still failing after fix attempts

priorFailures.summary: Failed with tier balanced, escalating to next tier

reviewFindings.message: AC-9 requires src/execution/parallel-executor.ts to be deleted, but the git diff contains no deletion for this file. The test in unified-executor.test.ts will fail because the file still exists.
AC-10 requires src/execution/lifecycle/parallel-lifecycle.ts to be deleted, but no deletion appears in the diff. The corresponding test assertion will fail.
AC-11 requires runner.ts to remove _runnerDeps.runParallelExecution, but no diff for runner.ts is present. The reference likely still exists.

story:started is emitted for each batch story with hardcoded modelTier: 'balanced', ignoring the story's own routing metadata. This produces inaccurate event data for stories routed to a different tier.

The pipelineContext is constructed with 'as unknown as RunParallelBatchOptions["ctx"]["pipelineContext"]', a double cast that suppresses a genuine type mismatch. The object is missing required fields (featureDir, story, agentGetFn at minimum) and the cast hides compile-time errors.

statusFile, startedAt, formatterMode, and headless are removed from the SequentialExecutionContext passed to executeUnified. No diff for executor-types.ts is present to confirm these fields were removed from the type. If the type still declares them as required, this is a TypeScript error.

userStories.title: Fix per-story metrics accuracy and migrate parallel tests
userStories.description: Plumb the storyCosts Map from ParallelBatchResult through to per-story StoryMetrics so each story's cost field reflects its actual agent cost rather than an even-split estimate. Set per-story durationMs to the time from worktree creation to merge completion for that story, not the batch total. Ensure rectification story metrics carry source: 'rectification' and an accurate rectificationCost field. Update or migrate test/integration/execution/runner-parallel-metrics.test.ts so it exercises the unified executor path rather than mocking runParallelExecution.
acceptanceCriteria: When runParallelBatch completes, the StoryMetrics entry for each completed story has cost equal to storyCosts.get(story.id) from the batch result

When runParallelBatch completes, the StoryMetrics entry for each completed story has durationMs equal to the elapsed time for that story individually (worktree creation to merge), not the wall-clock time of the full batch
When a story is successfully rectified after a merge conflict, its StoryMetrics entry has source: 'rectification' and rectificationCost reflecting only the cost incurred during rectification
When --parallel is set and a batch runs, a story:started event is emitted with the correct storyId for each story in the batch before the batch executes
runner-parallel-metrics.test.ts tests pass without mocking runParallelExecution — they invoke executeUnified directly with parallelCount set
NAX_SKIP_PRECHECK=1 bun test test/ --timeout=60000 exits 0 with no test failures

analysis:
The codebase has two separate execution codepaths: sequential-executor.ts (229 lines, exports executeSequential) and parallel-executor.ts (337 lines, exports runParallelExecution). The parallel path is missing ~80% of sequential's lifecycle logic: no pipeline event bus wiring, no cost enforcement, no tier escalation, no pre/post-run pipelines, no deferred review, and inaccurate per-story metrics.

Key files and their roles:
- src/execution/sequential-executor.ts: Main loop with pipelineEventBus wiring, cost checks, story selection via selectNextStories(), runIteration() dispatch. To be renamed unified-executor.ts with executeUnified() export.
- src/execution/executor-types.ts (74 lines): Defines SequentialExecutionContext (missing parallelCount) and SequentialExecutionResult. Needs parallelCount?: number added.
- src/execution/parallel-executor.ts (337 lines): Standalone parallel orchestrator with runParallelExecution(). To be deleted — its lifecycle logic is replaced by the unified loop.
- src/execution/parallel-coordinator.ts (319 lines): Has executeParallel(), groupStoriesByDependencies(), buildDependencyMap(). groupStoriesByDependencies() must move to story-selector.ts without duplication. executeParallel() is called by parallel-executor.ts which is being deleted.
- src/execution/parallel-executor-rectify.ts (140 lines): rectifyConflictedStory() with ConflictedStoryInfo, RectificationResult types. To be renamed merge-conflict-rectify.ts with identical exports. All imports must be updated.
- src/execution/parallel-executor-rectification-pass.ts (118 lines): runRectificationPass() and ParallelStoryMetrics interface. Logic to be absorbed into parallel-batch.ts, file deleted.
- src/execution/parallel-worker.ts (162 lines): executeParallelBatch() and ParallelBatchResult. Kept as-is — parallel-batch.ts calls it.
- src/execution/story-selector.ts (77 lines): selectNextStories() with StorySelection interface. Needs selectIndependentBatch() added using groupStoriesByDependencies moved from parallel-coordinator.
- src/execution/runner-execution.ts (250 lines): Has separate parallel dispatch branch (calls runParallelExecution then returns early). Must be simplified to always call executeUnified with parallelCount.
- src/execution/pipeline-result-handler.ts (220 lines): handlePipelineFailure() routes to handleTierEscalation when finalAction === 'escalate'. Must be reused by unified executor for parallel failures.
- src/execution/lifecycle/parallel-lifecycle.ts: Exists and must be deleted.
- src/execution/runner.ts: References _runnerDeps.runParallelExecution — must be updated.

Risk areas:
1. Import chain: parallel-executor.ts is imported by runner-execution.ts. Deleting it without updating all consumers causes build failures. Must scan for all import sites.
2. groupStoriesByDependencies move: parallel-coordinator.ts uses it internally. After moving to story-selector.ts, parallel-coordinator.ts must import from story-selector or a shared location — not duplicate.
3. Metrics accuracy: Currently parallel-executor uses even-split cost formula. storyCosts Map from executeParallelBatch (parallel-worker.ts) has per-story costs — must be plumbed through to StoryMetrics.
4. Sequential regression: The sequential-only code path in unified-executor.ts must be unchanged. When parallelCount is undefined/0, behavior must be identical to v0.54.6.
5. Event bus wiring: The sequential loop already wires pipelineEventBus subscribers. Parallel batch must emit story:started for each story before batch and story:completed after merge — using the same bus already initialized by the loop.

Migration order (dependency-driven): US-001 and US-002 are independent (no shared dependencies). US-003 depends on both. US-004 depends on US-003.
